prompt: A prospector's full field gear and pack organized at a rocky stream bank, ready for a day of gold prospecting. Chest waders laid out, waterproof gloves, a headlamp, a dry bag, waterproof boots, and a well-used backpack. Everything arranged neatly on the bank with a clear mountain stream and tall pines visible. Early morning golden light, mist on the water, Pacific Northwest wilderness, photorealistic, warm natural lighting, ready-to-head-out vibe.
